text:
(maint) Remove EOL cows from foss build_defaults.yaml

Ubuntu raring and quantal are both EOL, so let's not build anymore
packages for them.

(maint) Fix make-template-map test

The test was passing the wrong number of arguments for the current
definition, and it was also expecting an exception that is no longer
thrown (cf. 2a876d064c1acfc1ae08a8668a4fc262bb2fad7d).

Update the arguments and rework the test to just verify the result for
a trivial project.
are you interested in sending the patch to https://github.com/OpenVoxProject/trapperkeeper ? :)
Edit: Ah you are setting it properly below, nevermind.
I'm not sure it is.  On debian 12 with openjdk 17, it's , for example.

I was hoping we can use the unit file from the debian maintainers (https://github.com/OpenVoxProject/ezbake/pull/37#issuecomment-3152891788) as an intermediate solution because that's quicker to implement and test. As a long term solution I would also prefer the trapperkeeper update.

(maint) Remove EOL platforms from cow lists

We still had yakkety and precise in platform lists, but those are EOL so
let's get rid of those.
Is it then an idea to just blanket replace all instances in all files?
could you please rebase it?
this was more of a 'just in case we want to set explicit paths for debian in the future as well' :D But yes, right now it doesn't make much sense

Closing, as it is not necessary.

-edit- Turns out it **is necessary**. Need  to recreate the fix.

:sad-face:
matrix isn't available for ids?

(maint) Make default cow precise

We don't want to build packages for stable, so we need to ensure the
default cow is not set to stable. This commit updates the default cow to
be trusty
I was too scared to do this in all files because I want to avoid side effects
do we still need this?

Add -U to 

Without this, we don't always check for updated SNAPSHOTs.
are you interested in providing a PR for this?
(maint) missing 'then'
No, we are not going to do suggests.

Merge pull request #452 from underscorgan/maint/master/woops

(maint) We accidentally released 1.7.0 as 1.6.4.  Let's fix this up good.
Question is: can we merge this into the existing 8.x releases or is this more something for 9.x?
there are a few rake tasks we don't use, I want to remove them in another PR

Revert "(maint) Add build_tar: FALSE to foss build_defaults"

This reverts commit 8724f1b55b896bd41b541163d518adea5abee22e.
We were fixing a symptom of a problem, rather than the problem itself (see
RE-10238).
Do we still need EL7 specific code?
ah lol, yes, I will clean it up and merge afterwards
Is a time mandatory? Can we just leave it out?
could you please rebase this PR?

properly revert needsrestart blocklist

we reverted needsrestart in 0702730ef17906d64ba9d368686c0b2e4c56b86e,
but that wasn't complete.
could you please rebase this PR?
Is this comment really adding something?
Do we even build for EL6 or can we also simplify this?

Revert "(SERVER-29) exclude BouncyCastle jars from uberjar"

This reverts commit b1476ed3ba9624d58c5b1e18dd3ea1dcabf212ed.

This change needs to be put on hold until we have ezbake working
as a lein plugin; see SERVER-29 and PE-7256.
Oh, but that's jdk, not jre.  Lemme try that.
